title: The Little Ones
description: Find Little Mobs In The Wild And With The Ability To Tame Them
body:
## Little Ones: Angry But Sweet!
Break certain blocks like Oak, Dark Oak, Birch, Cherry, Bamboo Logs then you will have a chance to unleash tiny, angry mobs! These little creatures don’t like being disturbed, but don’t worry — each one has a unique sweet treat you can craft to tame them. More block types and mob variations coming soon!

# Update 1.3.0:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Update 1.3.0: A new little one of course! It the Jungle wood(special ability) this little creature is different from the others it can leap at player to do a jumping attack. Additionally, The Little ones spawning is easier base on the amount of wood is in that type tree!.**

</details>


# Update 1.2.0:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Update 1.2.0: A new little one of course! It the Bamboo wood(Different little one model, different animation, special ability) this little creature can shoot bamboo to attack that does 2 heart worth of damage. additionally, the Bamboo wood little will have a glowing effect when it about to attack! Code is now better and smoother.**

</details>


# Update 1.1.0:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Update 1.1.0: A new little one, the cherry wood(Different little one model, different animation, special ability) this little creature have the special ability to heal the player if you give it any pink flower(only flowers that been made by Minecraft) and A better description and logo for this mod!**

</details>
